CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CAHUA, LUIS EUSEBIO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AL-KOWNI, HUSSEIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AL-KOWNI, HUSSEIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAHUA, LUIS EUSEBIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,546.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AL-KOWNI, HUSSEIN PER MR. CAHUA'S REQUEST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAHUA, LUIS EUSEBIO HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
